meaning: adj.骡子似的,执拗的,顽固的
examples: You mulish guy, what the hell are you seeking?
He was so mulish that my admonitions just flowed over him.
A giant mulish horse team saved city of sweet day heart to set out from Qinghai.
It can be downright mulish about burying its rare moments of violence or sex.
Robbins can seem mulish and out of it, but then, as an impish grin takes over his face, he suddenly becomes inspired.
